'''Gaad''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] stationed onboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]. Gaad was killed in the months leading up to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. He was honored at a funeral service along with fellow pilots [[Jorgis]], [[L'Urak]] and [[Parch]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
